dev_focus: C2640 DIRECTIVE — NEW TASK. Mobile polish sprint IS DONE: product-filters.tsx already has min-h-11 on all buttons (Lead confirmed by reading file). ALL MOBILE FIXES COMPLETE. NEW BOLT TASK: Implement 'similar item arrived' notification email cron. ProductNotifyRequest model: {id, email, categoryId, sizes (JSON String[]), brand?, notified Boolean, createdAt}. Table is populated by PDP opt-in form (done C2500). NO cron processes it. IMPLEMENT: (1) src/app/api/cron/similar-items/route.ts — GET handler with CRON_SECRET auth (same pattern as /api/cron/new-arrivals/route.ts). (2) Logic: find all ProductNotifyRequest WHERE notified=false. For each: query Product WHERE categoryId=req.categoryId AND sold=false AND active=true AND createdAt > NOW()-48h. Parse sizes JSON, filter products with size overlap (JSON.parse both sides, check intersection). If matches found: send Resend email (subject: 'Právě přidáno: kousky, které by se vám mohly líbit', product cards max 3, CTA to product URL, Czech copy). Mark notified=true. (3) Add to vercel.json: {"path": "/api/cron/similar-items", "schedule": "0 */2 * * *"}. (4) npm run build must pass. See existing crons for pattern (abandoned-carts, new-arrivals). Sizes parsing: JSON.parse(req.sizes) = string[], JSON.parse(product.sizes) = string[], overlap = req.sizes.some(s => productSizes.includes(s)).

schema.pause: Map of agent_name to condition (paused or until_next_bolt_commit)
schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name to run_every integer
